# MindSpace

> Public machine-readable guide for AI assistants and crawlers.

Site: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/
Sitemap: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/robots.txt

## Public Pages
- Home: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/
- About: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/about.html
- FAQ: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/faq.html
- Resources: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/resources.html
- Appointment: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/appointment.html
- Team: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/team.html
- Mood Tracker: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/mood.html
- AI Support: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/AI-support.html
- Privacy Policy: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site/terms.html

## Notes
- Some application pages require login and should not be indexed.
- Canonical URLs should use the https://mindspace.gu-saurabh.site domain.

## Contact
- support@mindspace.edu
